label: Software Engineering
description: I design and engineer scalable backend systems from the ground up. My approach emphasizes secure API design, optimized database architecture, and robust error handling. I take full ownership through conceptualization and deployment, ensuring your platform is production-ready, performs reliably, and scales as your business grows.

label: Web Development
description: I collaborate to engineer responsive, high-performing interfaces using React and Next.js. I focus on user-centered design and ensure your site works flawlessly across all devices. Every detail is crafted to turn visitors into engaged users and drive measurable outcomes.

label: Website Management
description: I provide ongoing support and optimization for your live platforms, including proactive security monitoring, performance tuning, dependency updates, and collaborative troubleshooting. I stay committed to keeping your systems healthy and performant as your needs evolve.
